jsonLd.title: Manufacturing Engineer - Baidyanath - Top MNC
jsonLd.description:
Baidyanath has an exciting opening for a Manufacturing Engineer at our Chandigarh office. Join a company that values innovation, collaboration, and continuous learning.

About Baidyanath:
Baidyanath is a leading organization in the On-site sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Oversee daily production operations to meet output targets
• Ensure environmental compliance and waste management
• Implement lean manufacturing and continuous improvement initiatives
• Manage supplier quality audits and vendor development
• Train and supervise shop floor workers and supervisors
• Conduct root cause analysis for quality rejections and defects
• Ensure product quality meets internal and customer specifications

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• Bachelor's degree in a relevant field
• 6-10 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in SAP MM/PP
• Proficiency in FMEA
• Proficiency in APQP
• Proficiency in Kaizen
• Proficiency in AutoCAD
• Proficiency in PLC/SCADA
• Proficiency in PPAP
• Proficiency in Quality Control

Work Mode: On-site - Work from our office

What We Offer:
• Employee stock options (ESOPs) for eligible roles
• Professional development and training programs
• Annual performance appraisal
• Comprehensive health insurance for self and family
• Annual paid leaves and casual leaves
• Work-from-home flexibility
• Salary Range: 12 LPA - 25 LPA per annum

Location: Chandigarh, Punjab, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with Baidyanath!

educationRequirements.credentialCategory: Bachelor's degree in a relevant field
